hero.name: Mateo Dueñas
hero.title: Full-Stack Developer
hero.description: Turning complex problems into elegant, full-stack solutions. I design, build, and ship — from pixel to database.

poa.title: POA Management System
poa.description: Comprehensive platform for planning and budget management with RBAC model
poa.summary: A full-stack enterprise app for institutional planning and budget management. Implements RBAC with JWT auth, bcrypt password hashing, and SQL injection prevention. Features real-time budget tracking, collaborative planning, reporting dashboards, and audit logging.
poa.longDescription: A full-stack enterprise application designed for institutional planning and budget management. The system implements a robust Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) model with multiple user hierarchies. Built with modern security practices including JWT authentication, password hashing with bcrypt, and SQL injection prevention. Features include real-time budget tracking, collaborative planning tools, comprehensive reporting dashboards, and audit logging for compliance. The frontend uses React with TypeScript for type safety, while the backend leverages FastAPI's async capabilities for optimal performance. PostgreSQL handles complex relational data, and Docker ensures consistent deployment across environments.

keyFeatures.RBAC: Role-based access control with multiple user hierarchies
keyFeatures.Budget Tracking: Real-time monitoring and collaborative planning tools
keyFeatures.Audit Logging: Detailed activity tracking for regulatory compliance
keyFeatures.JWT Auth: Token-based authentication with bcrypt password hashing

techDescriptions.FastAPI: Async Python API for optimal performance

poa.techImpl: React + TypeScript frontend paired with FastAPI's async capabilities for optimal performance. PostgreSQL handles complex relational data with proper normalization. Docker ensures consistent deployment across environments. Security implemented via JWT authentication, bcrypt hashing, and parameterized queries for SQL injection prevention.

certificates.title: EPN Certificates Automation
certificates.description: Python tool for automated certificate generation with web scraping and data processing
certificates.summary: An intelligent automation tool that streamlines certificate generation for educational institutions. Uses Selenium for web scraping, Pandas for data processing, and automated template filling. Reduced generation time from 3 hours to 15 minutes.
certificates.longDescription: An intelligent automation tool developed to streamline the certificate generation process for educational institutions. The system uses Selenium for web scraping to extract student data, Pandas for efficient data processing and validation, and automated template filling for certificate generation. Features include batch processing of hundreds of certificates, data validation and error handling, duplicate detection, and export to multiple formats (PDF, Excel). The Jupyter notebook environment provides an interactive interface for monitoring the process and debugging. This tool reduced certificate generation time from 3 hours to 15 minutes, significantly improving administrative efficiency.

keyFeatures.Batch Processing: Handles hundreds of certificates in a single run
keyFeatures.Web Scraping: Automated student data extraction from institutional systems
keyFeatures.Data Validation: Duplicate detection and error handling pipelines
keyFeatures.Multi-format Export: Output to PDF and Excel formats

techDescriptions.Pandas: Efficient data processing and validation pipelines

certificates.techImpl: Selenium drives browser automation to extract student records from institutional systems. Pandas pipelines clean, validate, and deduplicate data before processing. Template engine fills certificate templates in batch mode, reducing manual processing from 3 hours to 15 minutes.

travel.title: Travel Allowance Calculator
travel.description: Budget estimation system with intelligent suggestions and export capabilities
travel.summary: A sophisticated budget planning application for business travel and institutional expenses. Provides intelligent cost estimation with real-time calculations, multi-currency support, and PDF export. Built with React hooks and Context API.
travel.longDescription: A sophisticated budget planning application for business travel and institutional expenses. The system provides intelligent cost estimation based on destination, duration, and travel category, with real-time calculations and dynamic form validation. Features include multi-currency support, historical data tracking for better estimates, PDF export with detailed breakdown, and integration with institutional budget systems. The interface is designed for ease of use with step-by-step wizards, auto-save functionality, and responsive design for mobile approval workflows. Built with modern React practices including hooks and context API for state management.

keyFeatures.Cost Estimation: Intelligent calculations by destination, duration, and category
keyFeatures.Historical Data: Tracking past expenses for improved future estimates
keyFeatures.PDF Export: Detailed expense breakdown in downloadable reports

techDescriptions.React: UI framework with hooks and Context API for state management
techDescriptions.JavaScript: Dynamic calculations and form validation logic

travel.techImpl: Built on React with hooks (useState, useContext, useEffect) for reactive state management. Dynamic form validation runs on every input change for immediate feedback. PDF generation library produces formatted expense reports. Responsive design ensures usability on mobile devices for field approvals.

storycraft.title: StoryCraft Platform
storycraft.description: Collaborative storytelling with monolithic and microservices architectures
storycraft.summary: An innovative collaborative writing platform demonstrating both monolithic and microservices architectures. Features real-time co-authoring via WebSocket, NestJS microservices, React+Redux state management, and Docker Compose containerization.
storycraft.longDescription: An innovative platform for collaborative creative writing that demonstrates both monolithic and microservices architectural patterns. Users can create, share, and co-author stories in real-time with version control and branching narratives. The platform implements WebSocket for real-time collaboration, NestJS microservices for scalability (auth service, story service, notification service), React with Redux for complex state management, and SQL Server for transactional data integrity. Features include character and plot management tools, AI-powered writing suggestions, publishing workflows, and community features like comments and ratings. The project showcases modern software architecture principles including API Gateway pattern, event-driven communication, and containerization with Docker Compose.

keyFeatures.Microservices: NestJS services for auth, stories, and notifications

techDescriptions.NestJS: Scalable microservices framework with dependency injection
techDescriptions.React: Frontend with Redux for complex state management
techDescriptions.SQL Server: Transactional data integrity for stories and users

storycraft.techImpl: Microservices architecture with separate auth, story, and notification services communicating via event-driven messages. API Gateway pattern routes client requests. WebSocket enables real-time collaboration. Docker Compose orchestrates the full multi-service stack for local development and deployment.

fitness.title: Fitness Tracker
fitness.description: A web application built for managing workout routines and tracking fitness progress.
fitness.summary: A comprehensive fitness management app built with ASP.NET Web Forms using strict N-Layer architecture. Features workout routine creation, progress tracking with charts, calorie logging, and social sharing. Implements stored procedures and Entity Framework ORM.
fitness.longDescription: A comprehensive fitness management application built with ASP.NET Web Forms demonstrating enterprise-level architecture patterns. The application uses a strict N-Layer architecture separating Presentation, Business Logic, and Data Access layers for maintainability and testability. Features include personalized workout routine creation with exercise libraries, progress tracking with charts and statistics, calorie and nutrition logging, goal setting and achievement tracking, and social features for sharing progress. The backend implements stored procedures for data operations, Entity Framework for ORM, and includes proper exception handling and logging. Security features include input validation, SQL injection prevention, and session management.

keyFeatures.Progress Tracking: Charts and statistics for performance monitoring
keyFeatures.Social Sharing: Share progress and achievements with others

techDescriptions.ASP.NET: Web Forms framework for server-side rendering
techDescriptions.N-Layer architecture: Strict separation of Presentation, Business Logic, and Data Access layers
techDescriptions.SQL Server: Enterprise relational database with stored procedures

fitness.techImpl: Strict N-Layer architecture separates concerns: Presentation (Web Forms), Business Logic (C# classes), and Data Access (Entity Framework + stored procedures). All database operations use parameterized stored procedures to prevent SQL injection. Session management and input validation secure the application layer.

spaceInvaders.title: Space Invaders
spaceInvaders.summary: A faithful Python recreation of the classic Space Invaders arcade game using Pygame. Features smooth 60 FPS gameplay, sprite-based graphics, progressive difficulty, power-ups, high score persistence, and sound effects.
spaceInvaders.longDescription: A faithful recreation of the iconic Space Invaders arcade game using Python and Pygame, demonstrating game development fundamentals and object-oriented programming. The game features smooth 60 FPS gameplay, sprite-based graphics with custom assets, collision detection systems, progressive difficulty with increasing alien speed, power-up mechanics, high score persistence, and sound effects. Technical highlights include game state management, entity component system for game objects, optimized rendering with sprite groups, and input handling with configurable controls. The project showcases understanding of game loops, frame-independent movement, and classic arcade game design patterns.

keyFeatures.Progressive Difficulty: Increasing alien speed and challenge scaling
keyFeatures.Power-ups: Collectible mechanics with high score persistence
keyFeatures.Sound & Collision: Audio effects and precise detection systems
keyFeatures.Entity Components: Component system for organized game objects

techDescriptions.Python: Core language for game logic and OOP architecture
techDescriptions.Pygame: 2D game development library with sprite and audio support

spaceInvaders.techImpl: Game loop runs at 60 FPS with delta-time for frame-independent movement. Entity component system manages all game objects (player, aliens, bullets, power-ups) through sprite groups for optimized rendering and collision detection. Game state machine handles transitions between menu, gameplay, and game-over screens.

godot2d.title: Godot Game 2D
godot2d.description: Game with traps, fruits that give points and a final trophy that congratulates the player.
godot2d.summary: A 2D platformer in Godot Engine showcasing physics-based character movement, collectible scoring, hazard mechanics, checkpoints, and particle effects. Built with GDScript, tilemap level design, and animation state machines.
godot2d.longDescription: A 2D platformer game developed in Godot Engine showcasing fundamental game mechanics and level design principles. The game features physics-based character movement with jump mechanics, collectible system with scoring, hazard and trap mechanics requiring timing and skill, checkpoint system for player progression, and particle effects for visual feedback. Built using Godot's node-based scene system, GDScript for game logic, tilemap system for level design, and animation state machines for character states. The project demonstrates understanding of 2D game physics, collision layers, signal system for event handling, and game feel through careful tuning of movement parameters.

keyFeatures.Collectibles: Scoring system with pickups throughout levels
keyFeatures.Hazards & Traps: Obstacles requiring precise timing and skill
keyFeatures.Particle Effects: Visual feedback for actions and events

techDescriptions.Godot: Node-based game engine with integrated physics, animation, and scene management

godot2d.techImpl: Godot's node-based scene tree structures game objects with parent-child relationships. GDScript handles character controller logic with physics-based movement. Tilemap system enables rapid level design. Animation state machines manage character states (idle, run, jump, hurt). Signal system enables decoupled event handling between game nodes.

godot3d.title: Godot Game 3D
godot3d.description: Game where you control a cube, climb a mountain and collect coins at the top.
godot3d.summary: A 3D mountain climbing experience in Godot Engine with physics-based movement, 3D collectibles, dynamic lighting, and a victory reward system. Explores 3D character control, camera algorithms, and vector mathematics.
godot3d.longDescription: An exploration of 3D game development using Godot Engine, featuring a challenging mountain climbing experience with physics-based movement. The game implements 3D character controller with camera follow system, terrain generation and environmental design, collectible system with 3D spatial awareness, lighting and shadow effects for atmosphere, and victory condition with reward feedback. Technical aspects include Godot's 3D physics engine, spatial nodes and transforms, camera positioning algorithms, mesh and material systems, and 3D collision detection. The project explores fundamental concepts of 3D game development including vector mathematics, quaternion rotations, and level design in three dimensions.

keyFeatures.3D Controller: Character movement with camera follow system

techDescriptions.Godot: 3D game engine with physics, spatial rendering, and camera systems

godot3d.techImpl: Godot's 3D physics engine drives character movement with proper collision detection on terrain meshes. Camera follow algorithm uses Lerp for smooth tracking with configurable lag. Quaternion rotations handle 3D character orientation. Mesh and material systems create the visual environment with dynamic lighting for atmosphere.

intro.bio: I design and build full-stack systems that are secure, scalable, and ready for production — from SaaS platforms and mobile apps to institutional tools and corporate websites. My work bridges frontend craft with backend robustness, delivering solutions that perform under real-world pressure.

bullets: Built and stabilized a full-stack SaaS monorepo (React, Node.js/Express, React Native/Expo, Supabase, Drizzle ORM, Stripe, Turborepo) achieving full production readiness across web, mobile, and backend.
Executed phased security hardening on a fintech investment platform: IDOR, CSRF, CORS, Zod validation, audit trails — directly reducing operational risk in live financial operations.
Delivered a corporate marketing website using Next.js, TypeScript, Bootstrap 5, and a full CI/CD pipeline with security scanning via GitHub Actions.
Designed and operated backend services, frontend modules, and data pipelines (Python, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, React) supporting institutional planning workflows.
Implemented role-based access control and data validation rules, improving data consistency and reducing rework during reporting cycles.
Consolidated bug fixes, dependency upgrades, and input sanitization, restoring 100% platform availability.
Delivered hands-on training in digital productivity tools to rural educators and senior adults, contributing to an 85% completion rate across 200+ participants.
Supervised 70+ instructors and validated weekly deliverables for 120+ learners, ensuring curriculum compliance and instructional quality.

ieee.company: Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers (IEEE)
bullets: Led the IEEE Computer Society chapter, organizing 30+ technical events (workshops, coding sessions, competitions), significantly increasing student engagement.
Coordinated collaboration between universities, international and local speakers, and sponsors across events.

epn.coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Databases, Software Architecture, Web Development, Services & APIs, Agile Methodologies

highlights: Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced and Academic course completed
